title: jacea neapolitana
intro: Jacea neapolitana, also known as Neapolitan wintercress, is a perennial plant native to Europe, characterized by its edible leaves and stems. The plant is rich in vitamins A, C, and K, as well as minerals like calcium and iron, making it a valuable source of medicinal properties. Traditionally, Neapolitan wintercress has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is typically consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and tinctures, to leverage its health benefits.
